creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fedora10 ports are End of Life, so there'll never be an update. Marking them insecure in vuln.xml is the best we can do.

CentOS 6 ports are currently in Limbo as CentOS has released 6.8. I do not have the desire (nor time) to port that one, maybe if bofh@ or dchagin@ are interested  :-) we can move this forward.
